Powering Knowledge through Education

PETRONAS believes that investing in education and human capital development at all levels will enable a continuous and sustainable pipeline of talent for PETRONAS, the industry, and the nation.

While PETRONAS aspires to realise its business goals, PETRONAS continues to uphold its contributions to sustainable development through improving access to quality education, promoting learning and development activities as well as enabling deserving recipients to realise their careers aspirations.

Education Sponsorship (SPM Leavers)

A sponsorship programme for deserving SPM leavers to pursue their tertiary education at Universiti Teknologi PETRONAS (UTP) and other top leading local and overseas universities in the United States, United Kingdom, Australia, New Zealand, China, Japan and South Korea.

 

 

 

Eligibility Criteria

1. Outstanding Academic Achievements

SPM of the current year
Local Programme: Obtained minimum SPM 8A & CEFR (B1)
Overseas Programme: Obtained minimum SPM 4A+ & 4A & CEFR (C1)

Note: Please note that the eligibility criteria for your application may vary depending on your selected discipline (technical or non-technical). For more detailed information, please refer to the PETRONAS education sponsorship application guidelines available at the Online Application System during application period.

2. Strong Leadership

We look beyond academics and considers the impact that students have made outside of the classroom. Participation in clubs, sports, community service, leadership roles, and other activities can greatly enhance an application.

3. Wholesome Assessment

As part of our commitment to selecting the most deserving candidates, we have designed a comprehensive evaluation process to gain a deeper understanding of your unique qualities and capabilities.

Personality & Cognitive Assessment (Online assessment)
This assessment evaluates your thinking abilities and inherent personality traits to understand how you process information, solve problems, and respond to situations. It helps us identify key attributes that align with the expectations and demands of a PETRONAS scholar.


Leadership Competencies Assessment (Online)
This assessment focuses on your demonstrated behaviours and experiences throughout your secondary education. It aims to evaluate how you have applied leadership qualities in real-life contexts and the extent to which these competencies reflect the standards of a PETRONAS scholar.


Student Potential Assessment (Face-to-face assessment)
This is a face-to-face interview where candidates will be assessed by our own PETRONAS assessors. The assessment is designed to measure candidates' leadership and behavioural qualities.

 

Terms & Conditions

This sponsorship opportunity is designed for individuals who exhibit outstanding talent, dedication, and potential.

Our selection committee is committed to identifying and nurturing the most promising talent among the applicant pool. In selecting the deserving wholesome talents, each application is carefully reviewed, considering academic achievements, personal character, leadership potential, and community impact.

As it is highly competitive, we want to emphasize that only those who meet the requirements will be shortlisted and selected for final award.

 

Application Period

The application for the sponsorship is now closed. Please stay tuned for the latest updates and future openings.

Education Sponsorship (Mid-Education)

A sponsorship programme for top-performing Malaysian students who are currently pursuing or have secured a conditional offer / firm acceptance to pursue degree programmes at approved universities in the United Kingdom.

 

 

Eligibility Criteria


Applicant must be a Malaysian citizen NOT more than 22 years old.
Applicant must NOT be under any other form of sponsorships.
Applicant has NO disciplinary cases or suspension throughout studies

1. Outstanding Academic Achievements

Undergraduate Students:
Currently pursuing a degree programme at a PETRONAS-approved university in the UK
Latest academic results equivalent to a minimum CGPA of 3.70 or First-Class Honours
Must have at least one full academic year remaining

  OR

Pre-University Students:
Have secured a conditional offer or firm acceptance to pursue a degree programme at a PETRONAS-approved university in the UK

2. Strong Leadership

We look beyond academic results. Active involvement in extracurricular activities, such as clubs, sports, competitions, community service, and leadership roles is highly valued and will strengthen your application.

3. Wholesome Assessment

Personality, Cognitive & Leadership Assessment (Online Assess
